name: Struts: Duplicate Validation Forms
description: The Struts application defines multiple validation forms with the same name, causing the Validator framework to arbitrarily select one and ignore the others, potentially leaving some form fields unvalidated.
detection_pattern: META[struts_validation_config] contains multiple validation form definitions with identical name attributes, causing a CONTROL[validation_framework] node to non-deterministically select which validation rules apply, potentially leaving INGRESS[form_data] unvalidated before reaching TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes
